project_type: Next.js 16 TypeScript app with React 19, Tailwind CSS
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build to confirm no compilation errors. 2. Run curl requests against API routes to verify Azure AI services respond correctly.
setup_instructions: npm install && create .env.local with required environment variables
environment_constraints: Full network access available. Can install packages and make external API calls.
contribution_requirements: Push to a feature branch, not main.
key_patterns: All API routes in app/api/ use NextRequest/NextResponse pattern. Gemini client is shared from lib/gemini.ts. Azure routes should use fetch() with REST API calls (no SDK). Pro/Free tier gating with PayPal subscription verification.
directory_structure: app/api/azure/ - Azure-branded API routes (currently all Gemini), app/api/ai-insights/ - Gemini insights route, lib/ - shared utilities, app/tools/ - frontend pages for tools
